name: folder-tools
description: Analyze folder structure, generate README and index files, and suggest better organization

actions.title: Folder Overview
actions.description: Summarize the contents and purpose of the folder

actions.title: Suggest Structure
actions.description: Analyze and suggest a better folder organization

actions.title: Generate README
actions.description: Generate a README.md file for the folder

actions.title: Generate Index
actions.description: Generate an index of all files in the folder with descriptions
